description: Utilities for generating and managing browser automation scripts for Node.js Puppeteer environments.

modules.name: puppeteer-helper
modules.description: An AI-powered assistant for generating and formatting Puppeteer automation scripts.

functions.name: generateAutomationScript
functions.description: Uses AI to convert a natural language description into a Node.js Puppeteer script.

functions.name: getBoilerplate
functions.description: Returns a standard Puppeteer script template by name.

functions.name: formatPuppeteerCode
functions.description: Wraps a logic block in a standard async IIFE Puppeteer structure.

modules.name: automation-selectors
modules.description: AI-driven selector analysis to find the most resilient CSS/XPath paths for automation.

functions.name: findResilientSelector
functions.description: Analyzes HTML to find the best selector for a specific element description.
functions.returns: Promise<{ css: string, xpath: string, stability: number }>

modules.name: crawl-manager
modules.description: State management for web crawlers including depth tracking and URL de-duplication.

functions.name: createCrawlQueue
functions.description: Initializes a crawler state machine with limits.
